lenses.guidance: vv 2-3's repeated 'the priest shall examine' — the imperative shapes the chapter as diagnostic protocol. The Hebrew ra'ah (look at, inspect) governs the rhythm. Priestly sight is given the authority to declare clean.

The chapter is a procedural inclusio of inspection cycles — vv 4-8 (skin), 18-23 (boil), 24-28 (burn), 29-37 (head), 47-58 (cloth). Repetition of seven-day quarantine builds a structure of patient discernment.
